_comment: MCP servers registered by install.sh via `claude mcp add`. Read this as data — it carries no secrets. Anything secret (e.g. REF_API_KEY) is read from the environment at install time, never stored here.

servers.name: context-layer
servers.comment: The in-repo, hand-rolled code-intelligence + memory MCP server. Built by install.sh (tsc -> dist/mcp-server.js).

servers.name: Ref
servers.comment: Optional documentation-lookup MCP. Skipped at install time when REF_API_KEY is unset.
